multiplayer_game_development.Description: Experienced in building real-time multiplayer systems using Photon Fusion and PUN2, including synchronization, matchmaking, and lobby flows. Focused on keeping online gameplay smooth and reliable across devices and network conditions.

gameplay_systems.Description: Designed and implemented flexible gameplay systems for mobile, WebGL, and live game projects. Comfortable shaping code that supports both player-facing features and future content expansion.

editor_tools_workflow.Description: Built custom Unity tools and debug utilities to improve level creation, QA, and production workflows. Aim to make systems easier for designers and other developers to use day to day.

backend_integration.Description: Integrated Firebase, Google Cloud, and REST APIs into live games for player data, authentication, and server-side support. Experienced in connecting game clients to backend services without making code hard to maintain.

optimization.Description: Worked on performance improvements through object pooling, profiling, mesh compression, and general gameplay tuning. Focused on keeping mobile projects responsive and efficient.

production_support.Description: Supported releases, CI/CD workflows, and live-ops features across multiple projects. Comfortable working across gameplay, tooling, and deployment tasks when projects need steady delivery.
